description: Per-scanner path-invariance contract for redos-checker — N1-class path (vuln in /api/test/ route, NOT a test-file). Route file `src/app/api/test/route.ts` uses a catastrophic-backtrack regex `/(.+)+$/` on user input. Post-v0.16.3 redos-checker must flag this as CWE-1333. Note: the fixture path deliberately avoids /vendor/, /generated/, /scripts/, .min.js which redos-checker also skips.
